text: I feel the contrasting energies of shared purpose and silent anticipation. In the first room, separated by glass, a group absorbs knowledge as I wait outside—a liminal observer, curious, perhaps a little out of place. The second space excites me intellectually, immersing me in ideas of research and development. The walls speak of coexistence with machines, sparking reflections on humanity's evolving narrative. There is a strange comfort here, caught between exclusion and inspiration.
